# FSItem.Attribute

**Structure**

A value that indicates a set of item attributes to get or set.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Attribute
```

## Overview

This type is an option set in Swift. In Objective-C, you use the cases of this enumeration to create a bit field.

## Working with identifier attributes

- **fileID**: The file ID attribute.
- **parentID**: The parent ID attribute.

## Working with metadata attributes

- **type**: The type attribute.
- **mode**: The mode attribute.
- **linkCount**: The link count attribute.
- **uid**: The user ID (uid) attribute.
- **gid**: The group ID (gid) attribute.
- **flags**: The flags attribute.
- **size**: The size attribute.
- **allocSize**: The allocated size attribute.
- **supportsLimitedXAttrs**: The supports limited extended attributes attribute.
- **inhibitKernelOffloadedIO**: The inhibit kernel offloaded I/O attribute.

## Working with time attributes

- **accessTime**: The last-accessed time attribute.
- **modifyTime**: The last-modified time attribute.
- **changeTime**: The last-changed time attribute.
- **birthTime**: The creation time attribute.
- **backupTime**: The backup time attribute.
- **addedTime**: The time added attribute.

## Working with raw values

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Inspecting requested attributes

- **wantedAttributes**: The attributes requested by the request.
- **isAttributeWanted(_:)**: A method that indicates whether the request wants given attribute.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
